segments.text: NINA: Hi, George! Glad you're back, Loads of people have phoned you.
segments.translation: 妮娜：啊，乔治！你回来太好了，一堆人打电话找你。

segments.text: GEORGE: Really?
segments.translation: 乔治：真的啊？

segments.text: NINA: I felt just like your secretary!
segments.translation: 妮娜：我都快成你秘书了！

segments.text: GEORGE: Sorry! I went into the library this afternoon to have a look at a newspaper and I came across something really interesting.
segments.translation: 乔治：不好意思啊！我下午去图书馆看报纸去了，结果发现了一个很有意思的东西。

segments.text: NINA: What? A book?
segments.translation: 妮娜：啥呀？一本书吗？

segments.text: GEORGE: No, a brochure from a summer festival - mainly Spanish music.
segments.translation: 乔治：不是，是一个夏日节庆的宣传册，主要是一些关于西班牙音乐的。

segments.text: Look, I've got it here.
segments.translation: 我把宣传册带回来了，你看……

segments.text: NINA: Spanish music? I really love the guitar.
segments.translation: 妮娜：西班牙音乐？我超喜欢吉他！

segments.text: Let's have a look.
segments.translation: 我看看。

segments.text: So what's this group 'Guitarrini'?
segments.translation: 这个叫“Guitarrini”的乐队是表演什么的？

segments.text: GEORGE: They're really good.
segments.translation: 乔治：他们很棒。

segments.text: They had a video with all the highlights of the festival at a stand in the lobby to the library, so I heard them.
segments.translation: 图书馆大厅有一个展架在放节日活动精华剪辑的视频，我听了一点他们的演奏。

segments.text: They play fantastic instruments - drums and flutes and old kinds of guitars.
segments.translation: 他们的演奏很出色——鼓、笛子，还有一些古典吉他。

segments.text: I've never heard anything like it before.
segments.translation: 我从来没听过这样的演奏。

segments.text: NINA: Sounds great.
segments.translation: 妮娜：听起来不错啊。

segments.text: GEORGE: Okay. Shall we go then? Spoil ourselves?
segments.translation: 乔治：那我们去不去？犒劳一下自己。

segments.text: NINA: Yes, let's.
segments.translation: 妮娜：好啊，一起去！

segments.text: GEORGE: The only problem is there aren't any cheap seats ... it's all one price.
segments.translation: 乔治：有个问题啊，没有便宜的票……所有票都一个价。

segments.text: NINA: Well, in that case we could sit right at the front - we'd have a really good view.
segments.translation: 妮娜：这样的话我们就坐前排好了——看得清楚一些。

segments.text: GEORGE: Yeah, though I think that if you sit at the back you can actually hear the whole thing better.
segments.translation: 乔治：那倒是，不过我觉得坐在靠后一些音效更好一些。

segments.text: NINA: Yes. Anyway we can decide when we get there.
segments.translation: 妮娜：也是。没关系，我们到了现场再说吧。

segments.text: NINA: So will you fill in the form or shall I?
segments.translation: 妮娜：那这个表是你填还是我来填？

segments.text: GEORGE: I'll do it. Name: George O'Neill.
segments.translation: 乔治：我来吧。姓名：乔治·奥尼尔。

segments.text: Address: 48 North Avenue, Westsea.
segments.translation: 住址：西海北大街48号。

segments.text: Do you remember our new postcode?
segments.translation: 你记得咱们这儿的新邮编吗？

segments.text: Still can't remember it.
segments.translation: 我到现在还记不住。

segments.text: NINA: Just a minute - I've got it written down here. WS6 2YH.
segments.translation: 妮娜：等会儿，我记了。是WS6 2YH。

segments.text: Do you need the phone too?
segments.translation: 电话号码要吗？

segments.text: GEORGE: Please. I'm really bad at numbers.
segments.translation: 乔治：要！数字什么的我真记不住。

segments.text: So, let's book two tickets for Guitarrini.
segments.translation: 好的。订两张Guitarrini的票。

segments.text: GEORGE: Okay. If you're sure £7.50 each is all right.
segments.translation: 乔治：你要是觉得7.5英镑的票价能接受的话就没问题了。

segments.text: How do you feel about the singer?
segments.translation: 歌剧有兴趣吗？

segments.text: NINA: I haven't quite decided.
segments.translation: 妮娜：我还没想好呢。

segments.text: But I've noticed something on the booking form that might just persuade me!
segments.translation: 不过表上有一项挺吸引我的。

segments.text: GEORGE: What's that then?
segments.translation: 乔治：哪一项啊？

segments.text: NINA: Free refreshments!
segments.translation: 妮娜：餐饮免费！

segments.text: GEORGE: Really?
segments.translation: 乔治：真的吗？

segments.text: NINA: Yes, look here. Sunday 17th of June.
segments.translation: 妮娜：对呀，你看……6月17号星期天。

segments.text: Singer, ticket £6.00 includes drinks in the garden.
segments.translation: 歌剧，票价6英镑，含花园的酒水。

segments.text: GEORGE: Sounds like a bargain to me!
segments.translation: 乔治：听起来很划算啊。

segments.text: NINA: Yes, let's book two tickets for that.
segments.translation: 妮娜：对呀。我们也订两张票吧。

segments.text: So, what else? I'm feeling quite keen now!
segments.translation: 还有什么吗？我都迫不及待了。

segments.text: How about the pianist on the 22nd of June?
segments.translation: 这场6月22号的钢琴演奏怎么样？

segments.text: GEORGE: Anna Ventura? I've just remembered that's my evening class night.
segments.translation: 乔治：安娜·文图拉的演奏吗？我突然想起来那晚我有课。

segments.text: NINA: That's okay. I'll just have to go on my own - but we can go to the Spanish dance and guitar concert together, can't we?
segments.translation: 妮娜：没事儿。我自己去就好了。西班牙舞和吉他演奏会我们能一起去吗？

segments.text: GEORGE: Yes- I'm sure Tom and Kieran would enjoy that too.
segments.translation: 乔治：当然。汤姆和基兰也会很喜欢的。

segments.text: Good heavens -£10.50 a ticket!
segments.translation: 天哪……门票10.5英镑！

segments.text: I can see we're going to have to go without food for the rest of the week - we'll need to book four!
segments.translation: 我们这周都不用吃饭了……我们要订四张！

segments.text: NINA: Wish we were students - look! Children, Students and Senior Citizens get a 50% discount on everything.
segments.translation: 妮娜：我们要是还在学校就好了……你看！儿童、学生和老年人所有项目半价！

segments.text: GEORGE: If only!
segments.translation: 乔治：别多想了！
